title: UltiItems
description: Adds a GUI which gives you above god-tier items.
body:
[![Swills](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModderZellior/Image/main/bannerofswills.jpg)](https://swills.gg/?ref=ZELLIOR)

Tired of typing long strings of commands just to get an item? Download this mod and it's all easier!

This mod adds commands which can do different things like give you above god-tier gear. This is all possible with vanilla minecraft, but the commands are simply too long. This mod simplifys this. 
It adds a GUI which you can open with the button 0. In it are 10 buttons. Here is what they do:
- Death Potion: Gives you a splash potion which can kill anything. Even players in creative mode! But it cannot kill undead mobs.
- UltiSword: Gives you a sword which can one shot anything and gives you extra health.
- UltiPotion: Gives you a potion which when you drink, you will get every positive effect in the game for 8 minutes. It also amplifies the potion effect like absorption 5 and speed 3.
- UltiArmor: Gives you a armor set that has custom effects when equipped like extra speed, hearts and protection.
- Stack Totems: Pretty much self-explanatory, right?
- World Destroyer: Gives you a pickaxe which can mine everything instantly except for blocks like bedrock and command blocks.
- Rocket Launcher: Gives you a crossbow that has Multishot 5 and Quick Charge 5. Also gives you rockets that explode and do damage. Make sure when using it to put the rockets in the offhand.
- Elytra Firework: Gives you a firework. Hold it and jump like when you would activate your elytra and press right-click. Works like an elytra.
- Railgun: Summons a Railgun. At the moment it does nothing.
- Remove Railgun: Removes the railgun.

This mod requires Fabric API and is available for many versions of the game. It is required on server- and client-side. This mod also works in survival without commands enabled.
